data.title: Ethereum's rising activity may be tied to dusting attacks as one researcher suggests exploiting low gas fees.
data.description: A cybersecurity expert suggests that Ethereum's recent spike in network activity may be related to address poisoning attacks taking advantage of reduced gas fees on the platform.

data.title: BNB may hit $950-$1,050 by Feb 2026, currently trading at $926 with neutral RSI and bullish MACD momentum.
data.description: Binance Coin (BNB) is currently valued at $926, showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and positive Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysts predict that based on technical indicators, BNB could potentially climb to a range between $950 and $1,050 by February 2026.

data.title: CMES Robotics secures new logistics projects to expand warehouse automation footprint using AI technology.
data.description: Innovative firms are tackling palletizing and depalletizing obstacles in various sectors like eCommerce, logistics, food & beverage, and manufacturing. On Jan. 20, 2026, in Seattle, CMES Robotics, a top provider of cutting-edge AI vision technology, revealed that it has obtained further support.

data.title: PioCreat introduces chairside dental 3D printing solutions at AEEDC Dubai 2026. First appearance in Dubai, from Jan 19-21.
data.description: PioCreat, a company based in Shenzhen, China, is currently participating in AEEDC Dubai 2026, the premier dental conference and exhibition being held from January 19 to 21, 2026, at the Dubai World Trade Centre. This event signifies PioCreat's debut in Dubai, showcasing its products and services to a global audience.

data.title: ETH expected to reach $3,350-$3,660 by late January 2026. Short-term target: $3,280-$3,350. Strong resistance at $3,266.
data.description: The price prediction for ETH is as follows: In the short-term (1 week), the target range is between $3,280 and $3,350. For the medium-term (1 month), the forecast falls within the range of $3,200 to $3,660. A key level to watch for a bullish breakout is $3,266, which is considered a strong resistance point.

data.title: Magic Eden co-founder anticipates a surge in speculation. Prediction markets hit a new high on Monday, with trades worth $814.2M on Kalshi and Polymarket.
data.description: The activity in prediction markets has reached all-time highs, as Monday witnessed a remarkable $814.2 million exchanged through trades on platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket.
